title: Vulnerability plugins on the site californiainjuryaccidentlawyer.com
description:
This plugin has a vuln and it cannot receive updates beacuse it is a premium plugin that does not have a paid license



The vuln severity is medium and this is a critical plugin for the site.  As a result we will not disable and delete this plugin, however we need to have this resolved asap.

https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2023-28775

cc:

title: Add Multi-Location NAP Footer - DEFAULT SETTINGS
description:
Please assist in adding the Multi Location NAP Footer with all default settings

https://johnsonattorneysgroup.com/

Default settings reminder:
  • GBP Name (links to location landing page)
  • City, State (links to location landing page)
  • Address (links to location landing page)
  • Phone (secondary GBP number if none then primary)
  • No buttons
  • No images
  • Lock all fields after live

title: Remove Human Trafficking Content from Website
assignees: Isaac Faseyiku, Johan Cilliers, Mubeen Dildar-Mia, Mvelo Nsibanyoni
description:
Seeking help w/ the client request please.
 
Domain: johnsonattorneysgroup.com
Summary: Johnson Attorneys Group does not handle human trafficking cases and has been receiving irrelevant leads and intake calls as a result of legacy content on their website. The human trafficking landing page and all related references across the site appear to have been added in September 2005 and have persisted since. The client has requested full removal of all human trafficking content across the entire website. This has created uncomfortable situations for staff, including a recent call in which a staff member had to inform a caller in distress that the firm cannot help.

Client Goal: Remove all human trafficking landing pages and any related references from the website entirely so the firm stops receiving irrelevant leads and intake calls related to this practice area.

Requirements for Completion:
  • Human trafficking landing page is identified and deleted
  • All references to human trafficking are removed from across the entire website, including any mentions in copy, navigation, practice area lists, or metadata
  • A site-wide audit is completed to confirm no remaining references exist following removal
  • Any internal links pointing to the deleted page are updated or removed to prevent 404 errors
  • AM is notified once removal is confirmed so the client can be updated
Deadline: No deadline stated, but this is an active issue causing staff distress and irrelevant lead intake. Treat as urgent.
---


Thanks much!

title: Post ShowCase Article to Injury Insights Blog Category
description:
Domain: johnsonattorneysgroup.com
Primary URL: https://johnsonattorneysgroup.com/category/injury-insights/


Summary:
Johnson Attorneys Group has provided a finalized and approved ShowCase article that needs to be published in the Injury Insights subcategory of the blog. The content includes embed elements at the top of the document. No images were provided. Client requested publication by Friday, 3/6.


Client Goal:
This is an internal Clixsy SEO initiative powered by ShowCase.


Requirements Checklist:

  • Article is published under the Injury Insights category

  • Content matches the approved Google Doc

  • All embedded elements at the top of the document are properly displayed and functional on the page

  • Formatting is consistent with existing blog posts on the site

  • Headings and spacing align with site standards.

  • Displays correctly on desktop and mobile

  • Post is live and publicly accessible

  • Publish date aligns with requested deadline (3/6)


Deadline:
AM requested Friday, 3/6.


Assets and References: Approved Content Doc: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ts3Q6BSJWJEX9QfoSOzUHkOd6_sQunYhWiq5a2YVIFA/edit?usp=sharing

title: Publish Blog Post – What Truly Sets a Personal Injury Law Firm Apart
description:
Seeking help post the blog below please.

Primary URL: https://johnsonattorneysgroup.com/what-truly-sets-a-personal-injury-law-firm-apart/

DISCLAIMER: Lawyer advertising. This advertisement is paid for by James Johnson of Laguna Niguel, CA, who is a licensed California attorney. This advertisement does not constitute legal advice and is not a guarantee, warranty, or prediction regarding the outcome of any legal matter. The hiring of any attorney is an important decision that should not be based solely on advertising. No representation is made that the quality of legal service to be performed is higher than that performed by other attorneys. No representation is made that the lawyers are certified specialists or experts in any field of law. No legal services will be provided unless a written agreement is signed by the client and lawyer. Client will not be responsible to pay costs if no recovery is obtained.

title: Homepage section edit
description:
Context:
Grover Law Firm has a video on the homepage “Featured Lawyer” section that was reviewed because it includes a shot of a group they no longer work with (“One Broken Biker”) around the 15–18 second mark. The client asked whether that segment could be removed from the existing video. 

If editing is not possible, they want the video removed from that location and the “Featured Lawyer” section removed from the page altogether. The client does not have the original source video files.


Key Questions / Clarifications Needed:

  • Can the existing video asset be edited without access to original source files?

  • If editing is not feasible, can the homepage video and “Featured Lawyer” section be removed cleanly without causing layout/design issues?

  • What is the exact homepage URL where this section appears?

  • Is the screenshot the client referenced available to attach for internal review?

  • If both options are possible, which outcome should be treated as the preferred approved path for fulfillment?


Relevant Client Message:


The video that plays on our main page in the "Featured Lawyer" area contains a shot in the video with a group that we are no longer in support of. The group is One Broken Biker. It's 15 seconds-18 seconds, and I have attached a screenshot of it. I am wondering if that shot can be cut from the video, or if that is in your wheelhouse? If not, I think we need to remove the video from that location and get rid of the "Featured Lawyer" part on the page altogether. As this video was uploaded long before I was employed here I do not have any of the original videos used previously.

title: Critical Issue Under Site Health Status on Blog Site
description:
From Sara:

We saw a notification that we wanted to bring to your attention on the blogging site.

On the back end of WordPress there is a critical issue under Site Health Status. Here is what it says: Autoloaded options could affect performance. Autoloaded options are configuration settings for plugins and themes that are automatically loaded with every page load in WordPress. Having too many autoloaded options can slow down your site. Your site has 940 autoloaded options (size: 3 MB) in the options table, which could cause your site to be slow. You can review the options being autoloaded in your database and remove any options that are no longer needed by your site.

Any insight on this you all may have would be much appreciated! Thank you!
